name: Zack Fair
description: __Height:__ 184 cm __Hometown:__ Gongaga A 1st Class SOLDIER in the making with a simple yet passionate dream of becoming a hero. Zack Fair is a talented yet stubborn young man, always bringing a positive energy and charisma with him wherever he goes. He is a very enthusiastic young man who will take any mission head on without fear to prove his worth to the Shinra company. He is also very popular among the women in Midgar, even to the point of having his own fan club. Zack left his home town of

name: Aoi Kanzaki
description: She is a Demon Slayer, though she works as a servant in the Butterfly Estate rather than taking to the front lines.

name: Bors
description: A member of Jaegars, he was formerly a member of the Incineration Squad. His Teigu is Rubicante, a flamethrower type Teigu. Despite his looks he is married to an attractive woman and has a child. He always wears a mask and tries to hide his face; yet Esdese forcefully removes his mask at one point and claims there is nothing wrong with his face. ~!He is killed by Chelsea while trying to retreat.!~

name: Lunch
description: Lunch is Muten-Roshi's house maid, retrieved by the young Goku and Krilin in order to receive martial-arts training from him (his requirement was to "bring him a pretty girl"). She has dissociative identity disorder; whenever she sneezes, she switches between a sweet, innocent girl with blue hair, and a cleavage-bearing blonde bombshell who commits crimes for fun and is quick to respond with gunfire when angered (pulling a machine-gun out from nowhere when needed). Neither of Lunch's personaliti

name: Oliva Biscuit
description: An assassin working for the US. He possesses an iron body and is almost invulnerable to anything. He and Yujiro crossed paths while he was sent to assassinate a drug cartel leader. He also has one bizarre technique in which he curls into a perfect sphere of muscle in which he is impervious to attacks, but can uncurl and seize his opponents, 'eating' them "like Pac-Man". He then crushes them with his muscles. His appearance and name are based on former Mr. Universe and three-time Mr. Olympia Serg

name: Scott Pilgrim
nativeName: スコット・ピルグリム
description: Bass player for the band *Sex Bob-Omb* with his friends [Stephen Stills](https://anilist.co/character/317372) and [Kim Pine](https://anilist.co/character/317384). Formerly dated rock star [Envy Adams](https://anilist.co/character/317368), lead singer and keyboardist for the band *The Clash at Demonhead.* He believes that smoking is evil, drinks "only on occasions", and he doesn't hit girls.
searchTerms: スコット・ピルグリム

name: Yoshiko Hanabatake
description: **Height:** 160 cm She is a high school girl who is stupid both academically and socially. She even gets zeroes on multiple choice tests. Yoshiko is a complete crack head that is addicted to bananas, to put it simply. She is an incredibly eccentric person who is also very annoying towards Akuru Akutsu, even though she truly wants him to love her. Yoshiko even goes so far as to let him see her panties. Yoshie Hanabatake even goes as far as to beg Akuru to be her boyfriend. Her idiotic actions tow

name: Hajime Sugoroku
description: __Height:__ 199 cm / 6.5 ft The head supervisor of Nanba Prison's Building 13.

name: Kotarou Azumi
description: Student of class 3-1 who belongs to the literature club. He's aiming to become a novelist and is inspired by Osamu Dazai & Natsume Soseki who are both Japanese novelists. He generally has a calm and composed attitude. He initially is too embarrassed to show his novels to other people, but upon learning Akane's love for running and openness to use embarrassment as a method of improving oneself, he begins to open up to that prospect. name: Yoi Takiguchi
description: __Height:__ 169.5 cm A first year student in high school. Known as the female prince of the school. She works at her family's ramen shop.

description: __Class:__ 2-B __Height:__ 158 cm A friend of Takahara Ayumi. Chihiro is a girl who tries to confess to a boy immediately after she thinks that he is handsome and attractive. However, she has confessed to many boys without positive results. Keima describes Chihiro as a "mob character" using visual novel argot. ~!While even though she forgets the conquest, it is later shown that Chihiro actually has a crush on Keima. name: KAITO
description: KAITO is the second vocaloid that Crypton released. He is often portrayed as a gentle, kind-hearted, easy-going, and somewhat oblivious young man. KAITO has no official given age but he and Meiko are often referred as "Nenchou-gumi" (年長組, The Seniors) compared to Vocaloid2s. He is 5'10" tall. His character item is ice cream. His voice was provided by the Japanese singer [Naoto Fuuga](https://anilist.co/staff/270355/Naoto-Fuuga).

name: Kaoru Seta
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7") Kaoru is a celebrity at her school and belongs to the theater department there. She is very popular with ladies, who she dubs her "little kittens". In particular, Uehara Himari and Rimi Ushigome have a tendency of blushing furiously in her presence. She likes to read philosophical books and poetry, but doesn't really understand it. Outside of the band, she is also friends with Shirasagi Chisato.

name: Mira Suou
description: __Height__: 165 cm Reito Mizuhara's agent who is tasked to assist him with his everyday needs and contact with the outside world.

name: Momotarou Mikoshiba
description: Seijuurou's younger brother. He's a first-year student at Samezuka Academy and specializes in swimming the backstroke.

name: Eri Sawachika
description: __Height:__ 165cm One of Tenma's close friends, Eri's father is British and her mother is Japanese. She has great difficulty with Kanji. Eri is extremely wealthy and somewhat spoiled (Western Europeans in Japan are stereotyped to be billionaires and extremely snobby). Eri is devoted to her father, but cannot spend as much time with him as she wants because of his work commitments. ~!She is attracted to Harima, becoming very jealous and angry towards anyone rumored to date him. This even causes s

name: Ginji
description: Ginji is one of the main characters of the Kakuriyo no Yadomeshi series and the young master of Tenjin-ya. He is a nine-tailed fox ayakashi who was the first ayakashi in the Hidden Realm to show Aoi real kindness on her first night in Tenjin-ya. He initially runs a small restaurant in the garden of Tenjin-ya but does not receive many customers. Later, he asks Aoi to work with him after tasting her human style food.

name: Hana Shirosaki
description: __Height:__ 142.3 cm (4'8") An elementary school student who is classmates with [Hinata](https://anilist.co/character/131477). She is often disturbed by [Miyako](https://anilist.co/character/131475)'s behavior but puts up with it in order to eat her snacks.

name: Mercurius
description: __Position:__ Seat XIII An ominous magician and alchemist who created Ewigkeit and established the Obsidian Round Table. He was the one responsible for turning the LDO from a clique of elite army officers merely dabbling in the occult into a den of genuine demons. Not only is Mercurius the one sworn friend of the Table's leader, he also stands as the only being capable of matching his sublime prowess. Although his position could be considered that of a mentor and a father, the other LDO members—

name: Michiru Inukai
description: ~!She has a Healing ability. Although unlike normal healing, she is giving up her lifespan to heal another. Often times after she heals a major injury, she feels lightheaded and sick. Her healing was shown to be of Type Heavy Injuries as she was able to completely heal Nana having received a fatal injury. She can do Resurrection, though it is at the cost of her life.!~

name: Pipimi
description: Pipimi is a tall, 14-year old girl. Pipimi is the calmer one out of the pair and goes for the more action packed and violent genres.

name: Youzou Ooba
description: Plagued by a maddening anxiety, the terrible disconnect between his own concept of happiness and the joy of the rest of the world, Yozo Oba plays the clown in his dissolute life, holding up a mask for those around him as he spirals ever downward, locked arm-in-arm with death.
